narrative:
Green Creek B (precinct in Sandusky County) has 568 registered voters, with 46.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.4 percentage points.
